settings.title: Blooms for the Hospice Ward, Every Friday
settings.excerpt: Our leftover stems now brighten rooms where they are needed most, and it has become our favorite delivery.
settings.body:
At the end of each week we are left with perfectly lovely flowers that are simply past selling. We hated seeing them go to waste, so we found them a better home.

Every Friday we now bundle what remains and drop it at the local hospice, where the staff place small jars in patients' rooms over the weekend.

It has quietly become the delivery we look forward to most. If you run a ward or a care home nearby and could use the same, come find us at the counter.
